hero.title: TaylorIssue
hero.subtitle: The world's only OpenClaw repair software.
hero.description: No technical skills needed to install. No money needed to repair. Install, use, repair, and uninstall — TaylorIssue helps you finish everything in one go.

features.title: Core Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to install, use, repair, and manage OpenClaw — without ever touching the terminal.

install.title: One-Click Install
install.description: AI-guided flow that auto-detects your environment and installs Git, Node.js, and OpenClaw for you.

repair.title: One-Click Repair
repair.description: System scan, automatic diagnostics, and fixes for common issues, plus AI-powered diagnosis for custom problems.

uninstall.title: One-Click Uninstall
uninstall.description: Granular cleanup options for services, packages, workspace, config, and data.

chat.title: Agent Chat
chat.description: Talk to your OpenClaw agents directly from the app. Select from available agents and start a conversation.

skills.title: Skill Management
skills.description: Browse, install, and manage agent skills from both local sources and the ClawHub community marketplace.

model.title: Model Configuration
model.description: Set up your LLM provider in seconds, with a built-in guide to free API providers.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.subtitle: What's new in TaylorIssue.
changelog.viewFull: View full release history on GitHub

items.install: One-click install with AI-guided flow that auto-detects your environment and installs Git, Node.js, and OpenClaw for you
items.repair: One-click repair with system scan, automatic diagnostics, and fixes for common issues, plus custom issue descriptions for AI-powered diagnosis
items.uninstall: One-click uninstall with granular cleanup options for services, packages, workspace, config, and data
items.chat: Agent chat that lets you talk to your OpenClaw agents directly from the app
items.skills: Skill management for browsing, installing, and managing agent skills from both local sources and the ClawHub community marketplace
items.model: Model configuration that sets up your LLM provider in seconds, with a built-in guide to free API providers

footer.description: The world's only OpenClaw repair software. An agent that manages agents.
